title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nature's Basket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nature's Basket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nature's Basket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nature's Basket:
Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket!
